# GitHub Repository Information

## 📝 Repository Description

**Short Description (160 characters max):**
```
An intelligent frontend monitoring platform that helps developers quickly locate and reproduce production issues through behavior recording and AI analysis.
```

**Alternative (more technical):**
```
Frontend error tracking with behavior replay, AI-powered root cause analysis, and smart issue deduplication. Built with TypeScript, NestJS, and React.
```

**Alternative (problem-focused):**
```
Stop guessing why errors happen. Rewind records user actions, replays error contexts, and uses AI to help you fix frontend issues faster.
```

## 🏷️ Repository Topics (Tags)

```

error-tracking

```

## 🌟 About Section

**Website:** `https://rewind.dev` (or your actual domain)

**Description:**
```
🎯 Intelligent Frontend Monitoring & Issue Localization Platform

Rewind helps developers quickly locate and reproduce production issues by:
• 🎬 Recording user behavior and replaying error contexts
• 🧠 AI-powered root cause analysis and fix suggestions
• 🔍 Smart error deduplication with fingerprinting
• 👻 Automatic blank screen detection
• 📊 Web Vitals performance monitoring
• 🚨 Intelligent alerting for error spikes

Built with TypeScript, NestJS, PostgreSQL, React, and modern web technologies.
```

## 📊 Repository Settings

### General

- **Visibility:** Public
- **Features:**
  - ✅ Issues
  - ✅ Projects
  - ✅ Wiki (optional)
  - ✅ Discussions
  - ✅ Sponsorships (if applicable)

### Branches

- **Default branch:** `main`
- **Protected branches:**
  - `main`: Require PR reviews, require status checks
  - `develop`: Require PR reviews

### Security

- ✅ Enable Dependabot alerts
- ✅ Enable Dependabot security updates
- ✅ Enable secret scanning
- ✅ Enable code scanning (CodeQL)

## 🎨 Social Preview Image

Recommended size: 1280x640px

Suggested content:
- Rewind logo
- Tagline: "Make Every Error Traceable"
- Key features icons
- Screenshot of the issue detail workspace

### LinkedIn Post

```
Excited to announce Rewind - an open-source intelligent frontend monitoring platform! 🎉

As frontend developers, we've all faced the frustration of production errors that are impossible to reproduce. Rewind solves this by:

🎬 Recording user behavior automatically
🔍 Replaying the exact context when errors occur
🧠 Using AI to analyze root causes and suggest fixes
📊 Smart error deduplication and performance monitoring

Key Features:
• Zero-dependency SDK (<15KB gzipped)
• Automatic blank screen detection
• Web Vitals monitoring
• Intelligent alerting
• Beautiful issue detail workspace

Tech Stack:
• TypeScript monorepo (pnpm + Turborepo)
• SDK: Rollup + Vitest
• Backend: NestJS + PostgreSQL + Redis
• Frontend: React + Vite + Ant Design

We're MIT licensed and welcome contributions!

Check it out: github.com/your-org/rewind

#OpenSource #Frontend #Monitoring #TypeScript #React #NestJS #DeveloperTools
```

## 📢 Community Outreach

### Hacker News Post

**Title:** Rewind – Open-source frontend monitoring with behavior replay and AI analysis

**Text:**
```
Hi HN! I'm excited to share Rewind, an open-source frontend monitoring platform I've been working on.

The Problem:
Frontend errors in production are notoriously hard to debug. You get a stack trace, but no context about what the user was doing. Reproducing the issue becomes a guessing game.

The Solution:
Rewind automatically records user behavior (clicks, navigation, API calls) in a circular buffer. When an error occurs, it captures the complete context and uses AI to help analyze the root cause.

Key Features:
• Behavior recording & replay (like a DVR for your app)
• AI-powered error analysis
• Smart error deduplication (95%+ accuracy)
• Automatic blank screen detection
• Web Vitals monitoring
• <15KB SDK with zero dependencies

Tech Stack:
• TypeScript monorepo (pnpm + Turborepo)
• SDK: Rollup + Vitest
• Backend: NestJS + PostgreSQL + Redis + BullMQ
• Frontend: React + Vite + Ant Design + TanStack Router

It's MIT licensed and we're actively looking for contributors!

GitHub: github.com/your-org/rewind
Docs: docs/README.md

Would love to hear your thoughts and feedback!
```

### Reddit r/programming Post

**Title:** [Open Source] Rewind - Frontend monitoring with behavior replay and AI-powered error analysis

**Flair:** Project

## 🎯 Target Audiences

1. **Frontend Developers** - Primary users who need to debug production issues
2. **DevOps Engineers** - Setting up monitoring infrastructure
3. **Engineering Managers** - Evaluating monitoring solutions
4. **Open Source Contributors** - Looking for interesting projects to contribute to

## 📈 Growth Strategy

### Phase 1: Launch (Week 1-2)
- Post on HN, Reddit, Dev.to
- Share on Twitter/X, LinkedIn
- Submit to awesome lists
- Reach out to tech influencers

### Phase 2: Community Building (Week 3-8)
- Write technical blog posts
- Create video tutorials
- Engage in discussions
- Respond to issues promptly

### Phase 3: Ecosystem (Month 3+)
- Framework integrations (Vue, Angular, Svelte)
- Plugin marketplace
- Community showcases
- Conference talks

## 🤝 Collaboration Opportunities

- **Framework Authors**: Integrate with Vue, Angular, Svelte
- **Monitoring Tools**: Integrate with Sentry, Datadog, etc.
- **AI Companies**: Improve error analysis with better models
- **Cloud Providers**: Offer managed hosting
- **Developer Tools**: Bundle with other dev tools

**Remember to update URLs and usernames before publishing!**
